content.en:
"I'll go, the four Dao Ancestor incarnations will come to hunt me down!"

Ye Tian sensed the situation behind him, and his expression suddenly changed.

He used his Origin Divine Power Void Shift, and his speed was already very fast, even faster than many True Ancestors, but the Dao Ancestor incarnations were too thorough in spatial research, and they were proficient in various speed flow Origin Divine Powers.

Therefore, the speed of the Dao Ancestor incarnations was even faster than him.

However, the Four Great Dao Ancestor incarnations were also very surprised.

They were also stunned by Ye Tian's speed, which was incredible.

In the midst of chaos, it is not uncommon for the True Monarch to create space and speed origin supernatural powers, but if the base speed is slow, no matter how much you use the space and speed origin supernatural powers, its speed will not be too fast.

And Ye Tian's speed was beyond their expectations, and he was the fastest True Monarch they had ever seen.

"Fortunately, the Ten Thousand Laws Daozi did not break through to the half-step True Ancestor realm, otherwise our speed would not be as good as his!"

Tumen Dao Ancestor secretly said in his heart.

At this time.

Ye Tian wanted to summon his master Void Heaven Dao Ancestor for help, but after thinking about it carefully, even if the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor descended and incarnated into the battlefield ruins and wanted to come to the rescue of him, it would be too late at all.

He can only rely on himself!

"Die!"

The Tumen Dao Ancestor was separated from a long distance and exerted an earth-based origin supernatural power.

I saw an earth spear full of endless coercion tearing through the void, descending in an instant, killing Ye Tian.

"Shake the sky!"

"Black Wind Realm Technique!"

Ye Tian used the Earthquake Origin Divine Power to shock the space, affecting the Earth Spear, and then used the Black Wind Domain Boundary Technique to restrain the Earth Spear, thus freeing himself from the lock of the Earth Spear and escaping the attack in an instant.

But the spear of earth still dealt a devastating blow to the area.

Chasing and killing all the way, the incarnation of the Four Great Dao Ancestors attacked Ye Tian from time to time, and occasionally really attacked Ye Tian, but it did not cause much damage to Ye Tian.

In terms of strength, Ye Tian was actually not much weaker than these four Dao Ancestor incarnations, but his strength level was not as good as the other party, and his understanding and use of the Great Dao was not as good as the other party.

Therefore, Ye Tian couldn't get rid of the pursuit of the four Dao Ancestor incarnations at all, and it wouldn't be long before he would fall into a predicament from which he couldn't escape.

Time was running out, and Ye Tian's mind kept thinking about how to escape from here.

If they weren't the incarnation of Dao Ancestors, Ye Tian could completely use the Great Realm Shift Chaos Divine Power to shuttle to other small worlds.

There are small worlds in this battlefield ruin, and there is more than one, although they are basically small worlds, but he can use the big world to move away from here.

However, the space of the battlefield relics was too stable, and it would take a little time to cast the Great Realm Shift, and that little bit of time was too long for the Dao Ancestor incarnations.

In addition, the Dao Ancestor avatar's understanding of space was completely beyond Ye Tian's imagination, and even if he was successful, the Dao Ancestor avatars would be able to forcibly break Ye Tian's teleportation.

Therefore, just the Chaos Divine Power level Great Realm Shift is no longer enough for the Dao Ancestor incarnations, if they face the Dao Ancestor directly, the Great Realm Shift is even more useless.

When the incarnations of the Four Great Dao Ancestors were about to catch up, Ye Tian suddenly thought of a way-

Black Wind Realm Realm!

"The Black Wind Realm Realm can help me get out of trouble!"

Hope ignited in Ye Tian's heart.

Before, when he was casting the Black Wind Domain Boundary Technique, he obviously sensed a number of special spaces, and those spaces were most likely the unique realms opened up by the Ten Kings of the Black Wind Mountain.

Of course, this is not a real realm, but a special world opened up by the simulated realm, which can be called a small realm.

These small realms were so hidden that even Dao Ancestors couldn't find where they were, and the Black Wind Domain Realm Technique was the only way to enter these small realms.

If you start the Black Wind Domain Boundary Technique, you can only send your consciousness into the small realm, but if you cultivate the Black Wind Domain Boundary Technique to the consummation realm, you can truly enter the small realm.

Ye Tian's Black Wind Domain Realm Technique had already cultivated to the consummation realm, so he could truly enter the small realm.

"If I escape into the small realm, let alone the incarnation of the Four Great Dao Ancestors, even if the true body of the Four Great Dao Ancestors comes, I will not be able to find the location of the small realm, let alone enter it!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

Before, he didn't understand what the small realm represented, but now he knew that the Ten Kings were able to create such a magical small realm, and their strength was absolutely extraordinary among the Dao Ancestors, far surpassing other Dao Ancestors, even his master was probably far inferior to a Black Wind Mountain King.

Immediately, Ye Tian once again cast the Black Wind Domain Boundary Technique, carefully sensing a connection in the underworld.

Soon, small realms emerged in his perception.

However, Ye Tian's other small realms seemed to be very far away, and the connection was very weak, and only one small realm was very closely connected with him, and it seemed to be among the battlefield ruins.

Thereupon.

Ye Tian followed the connection, wrapped himself in the Black Wind Domain Realm Technique, and tried to enter this Domain Realm.

Rumble!!!

Ye Tian's body was wrapped in a force, disappeared in an instant, crossed layers of space, and came to a strange place.

"What about people?"

The incarnations of the Four Great Dao Ancestors appeared one by one, and their divine consciousness constantly sensed spatial fluctuations, trying to find Ye Tian's location.

But no matter how they sensed it, they couldn't find where Ye Tian went, as if some kind of force had cut off Ye Tian's traces.

"How is it possible, he is just a true monarch, how can he escape from us?" Tumen Dao Ancestor was shocked.

Even if it was him, he couldn't get rid of other Dao Ancestor incarnations silently, how did Ye Tian do it?

Some kind of curiosity?

It's impossible, even if you use strange things to escape, there should be traces, so that they don't disappear silently.

"Could it be a treasure of the realm?"

Tumen Daozu guessed.

He guessed that Ye Tian had obtained some kind of treasure in the domain realm, and only in places like the domain realm could such treasures appear, so that they could not find Ye Tian's traces, otherwise there was no way to make sense.

Suddenly, they were even more interested in Ye Tian.

It's a pity that they can't find Ye Tian, even if they are interested, they can't help Ye Tian.

---------------

"There are no living creatures here!"

Ye Tian's divine sense scanned this small realm and muttered.

This place is like a starry sky, the area is not large, about the size of a previous solar system, and even less than some middle thousand worlds.

But the space here is extremely stable, even Ye Tian can't shake the space here, and even if he attacks, he can't break a star, at most a hill like that.

"According to what Jiong said, there should still be many strong people alive in the battlefield ruins, and the Ten Kings of Black Wind Mountain may still be alive!"

Ye Tian guessed.

It's a pity that he didn't see the Ten Kings of Black Wind Mountain this time, but coming to this small realm, this is already quite a good gain, at least he can now use this place as a safe rear.

In the event of danger, he could have come here in time.

"This time the harvest is good, don't go out for the time being, retreat here for a while, and improve your strength a little!"

Ye Tian planned to say.
